notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for nepal. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Nepal
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Nepal, VIZA AI should consider the Nepal tourist visa on arrival or online pre-arrival route at authorized entry points. First confirm nationality, arrival airport or land border, stay length, accommodation, trek plans and whether restricted-area permits may be needed. Trekking and restricted-area permits are separate from the tourist visa. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Nepal on-arrival tourist visa process
chunks.content: Nepal Immigration states that Tourist Visa on Arrival is available at Tribhuvan International Airport and other authorized entry/exit points. Tourist visa on arrival is the only entry visa for tourists and is issued with multiple re-entry facility, with common 15-day, 30-day and 90-day categories. Chinese nationals are listed in Nepal guidance as eligible for on-arrival visa at authorized entry points.

chunks.title: Nepal documents and trekking caution
chunks.content: For Nepal, collect passport validity, arrival airport/land border, intended stay length, photo, accommodation/itinerary and whether the user will trek or enter restricted areas. Explain that trekking permits or restricted-area permits are separate from the tourist visa and may be needed for certain routes.

documents.title: Nepal Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Nepal application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Nepal online pre-arrival / on-arrival tourist visa workflow Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://nepaliport.immigration.gov.np/ ; https://tia.immigration.gov.np/en/post/on-arrival-tourist-visa. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Nepal fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, arrival point, stay length, address in Nepal, contact details and visa duration category

chunks.title: Nepal supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport, photo, online receipt/kiosk slip where applicable, visa fee unless gratis/exempt, and trekking/restricted-area permits if relevant Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.
